groupings.name: Lights Off, World Gone
groupings.description: Alone in a quiet room, headphones in, the outside world completely irrelevant.

groupings.name: Slow Dissolve at 2am
groupings.description: Something between longing and surrender, right before you stop resisting sleep.

groupings.name: Driving Past the Exit
groupings.description: You missed your turn twenty minutes ago and you genuinely do not care.

groupings.name: Lost on the Dancefloor
groupings.description: The beat drops and you forget your name for a few glorious minutes.

groupings.name: Golden Hour, Nowhere to Be
groupings.description: A warm, hazy afternoon with no obligations and the windows cracked open.

groupings.name: Sunday of Missing Someone
groupings.description: The quiet ache of a person you haven't stopped thinking about all week.

groupings.name: Riding Through the Night
groupings.description: Moving through dark streets with the windows down and nothing to prove to anyone.
